message:
style: fix trailing whitespace and alphabetize module imports in messaging

- Remove trailing whitespace on empty line in Sublist hash computation
  block (src/messaging/subject.rs:751)
- Reorder #[path] module imports in the progressive disclosure contract
  test to alphabetical order (ir before subject), matching project
  conventions for deterministic compilation order

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
